texto: Some travellers are apt to advance more than is perhaps strictly true; if any of the company entertain a doubt of my veracity, I shall only say to such, I pity their want of faith, and must request they will take leave before I begin the second part of my adventures, which are as strictly founded in fact as those I have already related.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Rudolph Erich Raspe sobre temas ligados a fe. A afirmação “Some travellers are apt to advance more than is perhaps strictly true; if any of the company ente…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a fe, fiction, raconteur, útil em momentos de viagem e raconteur.
